creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
Build for ghostscript8-nox11-8.71_14 fails at:
/bin/sh <./obj/../soobj/ldt.tr
rm -f ./bin/../sobin/libgs.so.8
ln -s libgs.so.8.71 ./bin/../sobin/libgs.so.8
rm -f ./bin/../sobin/libgs.so
ln -s libgs.so.8.71 ./bin/../sobin/libgs.so
gcc48  -DHAVE_MKSTEMP -DHAVE_HYPOT   -DHAVE_FONTCONFIG -Os -O3 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DUPD_SIGNAL=0 -I.  -I/var/tmp/export/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11/work/ghostscript-8.71/jasper/src/libjasper/include  -I/usr/local/include/libpng15  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/freetype2  -Wall -Wstrict-prototypes -Wundef -Wmissing-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wno-strict-aliasing -Wdeclaration-after-statement -fno-builtin -fno-common -DHAVE_STDINT_H -DGX_COLOR_INDEX_TYPE="unsigned long long" -Os -O3 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-strict-aliasing -DUSE_LIBICONV_GNU -DUSE_LIBPAPER -DGS_DEVS_SHARED -DGS_DEVS_SHARED_DIR=\"/usr/local/lib/ghostscript/8.71\" -I./obj/../soobj -I./base  -g -o ./bin/../sobin/gsc ./psi/dxmainc.c -L./bin/../sobin -lgs
./bin/../sobin/libgs.so: undefined reference to `lips_mode3format_encode'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
gmake[1]: *** [bin/../sobin/gsc] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/export/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11/work/ghostscript-8.71'
gmake: *** [so] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /export/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11.

===>>> make failed for print/ghostscript8-nox11

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to build ghostscript8-nox11-8.71_14
